title: Invalid phone (too short) shows validation error and stays on sign-up form
description: Verifies phone validation prevents sign-up when the phone number has fewer than 10 digits.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Invalid phone (too long) shows validation error and stays on sign-up form
description: Verifies phone validation prevents sign-up when the phone number has more than 10 digits.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Invalid phone prefix shows validation error and stays on sign-up form
description: Verifies phone validation prevents sign-up when the phone number uses a wrong/unaccepted prefix.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Missing name prevents sign-up and shows error
description: Verifies the sign-up form requires a name and displays an error when name is missing.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form

title: Missing password prevents sign-up and shows error
description: Verifies the sign-up form requires a password and displays an error when password is missing.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Sign-up with phone containing non-numeric characters shows error
description: Verifies the sign-up form rejects phone input that contains letters or symbols and remains on the sign-up form.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form
Type "Test User" into the name field

title: Switching to sign-up form shows required fields
description: Verifies the user can switch from login to sign-up and the sign-up form fields are visible.

steps.description: Click on "Sign up" to switch to the sign-up form

title: Browse products list shows a product grid
description: Verifies the products listing page loads successfully and displays the product grid.

title: Search filters products by name or description
description: Verifies that typing in the search input filters the visible products in the grid.

title: Search with no matches shows no-results message
description: Verifies that a search term with no matches displays a 'no products found' state.

steps.description: Verify text "no products found" is visible

title: Open product details by clicking a product card
description: Verifies that clicking a product navigates to its product details page.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the product grid

title: Apply a category filter and see filtered results
description: Verifies that applying a category filter updates the product grid to show results for that category.

title: Apply filters that return no results shows no-products message
description: Verifies that applying filters resulting in zero matches displays a 'no products found' message.

steps.description: Select "A category with no products" from dropdown "Category"
Verify text "no products found" is visible

title: Clear search restores product results
description: Verifies that clearing the search input restores the product grid to a non-empty state.

steps.description: Verify text "no products found" is visible

title: Search then click a result opens the matching product details
description: Verifies that after filtering with search, clicking a visible result navigates to its product details page.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the filtered product grid

title: Open a product detail page and verify core product information is visible
description: Verifies that a product detail page loads and shows key product information and imagery.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Verify element "Product image gallery" is visible

title: Select a valid in-stock variant and add the item to the cart from product detail
description: Verifies selecting a variant and successfully adding it to cart shows a confirmation toast.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Verify element "Add to Cart" is visible
Select an available option from the first product options/variants dropdown

title: Add to cart and verify the cart shows the added product line item
description: Verifies the cart page reflects the newly added item after adding from product detail.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Select an available option from the first product options/variants dropdown
Verify element "Cart items list" is visible

title: Out-of-stock variant shows نفذت الكمية and disables Add to Cart
description: Verifies selecting an out-of-stock variant displays the out-of-stock message and prevents adding to cart.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Select an out-of-stock option from the product options/variants dropdown
Verify element "Add to Cart (disabled)" is visible

title: Similar products section is visible on product detail page
description: Verifies upsell recommendations (similar products) render on the product detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Verify element "Similar products list" is visible

title: Switching variants updates the visible selected variant state
description: Verifies selecting different options/variants visibly changes the selected state on the product detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Select an available option from the first product options/variants dropdown
Select a different available option from the same product options/variants dropdown
Verify element "Add to Cart" is visible

title: Product detail page remains usable after refresh-like revisit (via products list)
description: Verifies the product detail page can be re-entered from the products list and still allows variant selection and add-to-cart.

steps.description: Click on the first product in the products list
Click on the first product in the products list
Select an available option from the first product options/variants dropdown
Verify element "Add to Cart" is visible

title: Proceed to checkout from cart after increasing quantity updates totals
description: Verifies that increasing an item's quantity updates the total and the user can proceed to checkout from the cart page.

steps.description: Verify element "Proceed to checkout" is visible
Click on the "+" (increase quantity) control for the first cart item

title: Attempt to increase quantity beyond stock shows 'بقي X فقط' and does not change quantity
description: Verifies that exceeding available stock displays the 'only X left' message and prevents quantity increase.

steps.description: Click on the "+" (increase quantity) control for the first cart item repeatedly until a stock limit message appears
Click on the "+" (increase quantity) control once more

title: Decrease quantity reduces item quantity and keeps cart totals visible
description: Verifies that decreasing quantity works and totals remain visible after the update.

steps.description: Click on the "-" (decrease quantity) control for the first cart item
Click on the "-" (decrease quantity) control for the first cart item again

title: Remove an item from cart updates the cart contents and total section remains present
description: Verifies that removing an item updates the cart view and the total section is still displayed appropriately.

steps.description: Click on "Remove" for the first cart item
Verify element "Proceed to checkout" is visible

title: Cart total section is visible and stable after quantity changes
description: Verifies that the total price section is visible and does not disappear across quantity increases/decreases.

steps.description: Click on the "+" (increase quantity) control for the first cart item
Click on the "-" (decrease quantity) control for the first cart item

title: Proceed to checkout button is present and clickable from cart
description: Verifies that the cart page presents a clear call-to-action to proceed to checkout and navigation occurs on click.

steps.description: Verify element "Proceed to checkout" is visible
Scroll to the "Proceed to checkout" section

title: Cart page renders item list with quantity controls and prices
description: Verifies the cart page displays cart items including quantity controls and price information.

steps.description: Verify element "Proceed to checkout" is visible

title: Place an order successfully with delivery info, delivery method, and a valid coupon
description: Verifies a customer can complete checkout, apply a valid coupon, place the order, and land on the success page.

steps.description: Fill "Valid delivery address and contact details" into the delivery address and contact information form
Select "Any available delivery method" from the delivery method options
Type "VALIDCOUPON" into the coupon code field

title: Checkout validation: required address fields missing blocks placing an order
description: Verifies required field validation is shown and checkout does not proceed when address fields are empty.

title: Invalid coupon code is rejected and user remains on checkout
description: Verifies an invalid coupon shows an error message and does not redirect away from checkout.

steps.description: Fill "Valid delivery address and contact details" into the delivery address and contact information form
Select "Any available delivery method" from the delivery method options
Type "NOT_A_REAL_COUPON_123" into the coupon code field

title: Coupon apply button with empty coupon input shows validation / no success state
description: Verifies the coupon cannot be applied when the coupon field is empty.

steps.description: Scroll to the coupon code section

title: Delivery method is required before placing an order
description: Verifies checkout blocks placing an order when delivery method is not selected.

steps.description: Fill "Valid delivery address and contact details" into the delivery address and contact information form

title: Order summary is visible and updates after applying a coupon
description: Verifies the order summary is shown and reflects a coupon being applied (e.g., discount/total changes or coupon applied indicator).

steps.description: Fill "Valid delivery address and contact details" into the delivery address and contact information form
Select "Any available delivery method" from the delivery method options
Type "VALIDCOUPON" into the coupon code field

title: Open Categories page and see category list
description: Verifies that the Categories page loads and displays a visible list of categories.

title: Select a category and view filtered products
description: Verifies that clicking a category navigates to the category page and shows products for that category.

steps.description: Click on the first category in the list

title: Category page shows selected category name/title
description: Verifies that after selecting a category, the category name is shown on the filtered results page.

title: Category with no products shows empty-state message
description: Verifies that selecting a category that has no products displays a visible 'no products found' empty state.

steps.description: Click on a category that is known to have no products
Verify text "no products found" is visible

title: Categories page handles loading state then shows results
description: Verifies that the Categories page shows a loading state (if present) and then renders categories.

steps.description: Wait for element "category list" to appear

title: Add a product to favorites from Products list and verify it appears in Favorites, then open its product detail
description: Verifies a user can favorite a product from the products listing, see confirmation, find it in favorites, and open its product detail page.

steps.description: Click the favorite (heart) icon on the first visible product card
Verify text "added to favorites" is visible
Click on the "Favorites" link in the site navigation
Click on the first product in the favorites list

title: Remove a favorited product from Favorites list
description: Verifies a user can remove an item from the favorites list and the UI updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click the favorite (heart) icon on the first visible product card
Verify text "added to favorites" is visible
Click on the "Favorites" link in the site navigation
Click "Remove" on the first product in the favorites list
Verify text "removed from favorites" is visible

title: Favorite and then unfavorite the same product from Products list
description: Verifies toggling the favorite state from the product listing adds then removes the product from favorites.

steps.description: Click the favorite (heart) icon on the first visible product card
Verify text "added to favorites" is visible
Click the favorite (heart) icon again on the same product card
Verify text "removed from favorites" is visible
Click on the "Favorites" link in the site navigation

title: Favorites list persists during navigation within the session
description: Verifies a favorited item remains visible in the favorites list after navigating away and returning (within the same browser session).

steps.description: Click the favorite (heart) icon on the first visible product card
Verify text "added to favorites" is visible
Click on the "Home" link in the site navigation
Click on the "Favorites" link in the site navigation

title: Favorites page: clicking a favorited product opens its product details page content
description: Verifies that selecting a favorited item navigates to a product detail page with visible product information.

steps.description: Click the favorite (heart) icon on the first visible product card
Verify text "added to favorites" is visible
Click on the "Favorites" link in the site navigation
Click on the first product in the favorites list
Verify element "Add to cart" is visible

title: Favorites page renders list UI without errors when at least one favorite exists
description: Verifies the favorites page shows standard list UI (not empty state) when favorites exist.

steps.description: Click the favorite (heart) icon on the first visible product card
Verify text "added to favorites" is visible
Click on the "Favorites" link in the site navigation
Verify text "No favorites" is not visible
